steps.title: Use the shared-species clue
steps.content: Rivera-Santos's program helped one endangered Amazona species. Since that species corresponds in physiology, behavior, and ecology to related species, the approach may be usable across the genus.

steps.title: Reject wrong meanings
steps.content:
• Choice B means understandable, not usable again.
  • Choice C means able to be seen, not applied elsewhere.
  • Choice D implies needing rescue, which conflicts with the successful program.

steps.title: Choose the reusable word
steps.content: Replicable means capable of being repeated or applied again, matching the idea that the approach could work for related species. The answer is A.
